transcript.text:
Worry about your small intestines too! [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[I'm sorry Gopchang! (Beef small intestines)]
[7kgs worth!]
[1?]
[2?]
[4?]
[No, as a whole]
[Tzuyang's small intestine: HELP...]
There's no way of going back
[You'll regret being my small intestine]
Hello everyone
I prepared Gopchang (beef small intestines) today
There's a brand of gopchang at "Eat-At-Home"
Their gopchang brand is one of the first streams that went viral and got me to where I'm at today
[Footage from 2019.01.23]

[She ate a lot back then too...]
It was very delicious
They sponsored today's mukbang, so here it is
Looks delicious
I had a great meal last time
Here we have small intestines, large intestines, heart, abomasum, mountain chain tripe, and rice cake
This is all about 7kgs
The gopchang by itself was about 20kgs before it was cooked
How many servings this is?
[Calculating]
[Error]
It's.. a lot
They come packaged like this
It's been so long
They're double-packaged
Ta-da Just like this

They have sauces here
Rice cake powder, garlic sauce, bean powder, pickled onion soy sauce
I lost my cup Not sure where it went
[Did I leave it at Ulleungdo?]
That sizzle
Let's eat 1 rice cake
I love it
[WIth some sauce]
Gopchang too
It's filled
How about now?
I've been told it goes well with this soy sauce
It would've been nice to have some onions, but I don't have that at home
That's so good It doesn't have a gamey taste
It's always great
The filling (fat) explodes

Pickled onion soy sauce
Daechang (large intestines) this time Cooked well
This goes well with hot sauce
This neutralizes the greasiness
Teukyang (mountain chain tripe)
Teriyaki sauce with this
I cooked it so well
I didn't know how to cook it at first, so it was really tough to chew
But it's really tender today
Makchang (abomasum) this time
This goes with the garlic sauce
That's so good
Gopchang is what?
You must eat it as a whole
That's so tender
With some spicy sauce

So tasty
Bean powder here too
2 of them dipped in
4 of them this time
Filled with fat
I'm happy
[What's the ruckus?]
Cooked well-done is good too
Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside
This must be daechang
I can't eat that much daechang, but it tastes so good with this sauce
This is the heart
Teriyaki sauce
That's good
Even if it's gotten cold
I remember when I first had this

I had barely started streaming maybe 2~3 months in
I was glad that I started streaming because of it
Let's heat it up again
There's some space here for me to cook
This really is a lot of food
Don't fall down!
It took me a long time
This is all from "Eat-At-Home"
They use a special method to keep the meat tender
And it's really really really tender
Makchang
[1 drops]
[Leave it there for me]
The sauces are tasty
Rice cake!
Dip it

Powder too
Bean powder is really sweet
It's nutty, but also very sweet
I forgot to put the bowl here to catch the oil My table is a mess now
Whatever, let's eat
Makchang tastes really good
It's really really really really chewy and delicious
4 at a time
Pickled onion soy sauce
Be careful not to breathe in when you eat the powder
Teukyang Don't over-cook this part
It must be cooked right to be really chewy and tasty
Shocking
It's easy to cook
It'll take really long to cook if it was raw
But these come somewhat cooked, so all you need to do is cook them again

This is drained in grease
That's good
That's hot Don't get angry
What? The fire is on high
Gopchang and rice cake go well together
Teukyang
You can feel the grains
Dip it in teriyaki
Yummy
Lettuce wrap
Daechang with spicy sauce
Lettuce wrap
The small piece is filled too
I'm shivering
I've been wanting to try this
Spicy gopchang stew

I'm melting this at the moment
I'm going to eat it after this mukbang
I don't eat bean powder with other foods But this goes well
[What did you say about inhaling?]
"Be careful not to breathe in when you eat the powder"
Don't inhale
I keep eating and it's still the same
Oh no! There's no going back
5 of them
Eating a mouthful of it makes it taste even better
Jingu~
Sleeping
You usually take pork or beef for camping, right?
But these are cooked beforehand, so it's really convenient to take for camping
Gopchang while camping
My room is filled with gopchang smell

It'll take days to air out
Delicious
Sometimes you get this extra tasty piece
Although all of them are tasty
But there's that extra tasty one
Come down
There's still a lot
I think this is the most gopchang I've ever eaten
This sauce is the best for rice cakes
Rice cake should be grilled like this
It's even better cooked in grease
That fat
Soy sauce
Let's start a new batch
Is that too much?
No way

I didn't even know this was here
I was going to eat 2 at first
Has it been here this whole time?
[It's hot!]
It exploded
Sometimes people find it interesting that sometimes I eat for like 4 hours
It can take up to 7 hours sometimes
[I can eat all day]
[Oh my heart...]
[I love you Jingu]
Green onion
Should I eat it?
Almost like eating a bamboo leaf
What in the world
This one looks extra crispy
Delicious!

It's not bad to cook it a lot to get it extra crispy
They're like chips
[Eating chips as a dessert after a meal]
[1 last piece]
That was a really good meal
How pleasant it is to have a meal like this at home
And also...
There's this pack of thinly-sliced shoulder and beef heart
They are randomly throwing this in if you order any of these intestines as an event!
Definitely check it out if you're a fan of intestines Thanks everyone! [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Boramae Regional Children's Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
